data: Classic Chocolate Chip Cookies: Cream 1 cup softened butter, 3/4 cup white sugar, and 3/4 cup brown sugar. Whisk in 2 large eggs and 2 tsp vanilla. Stir in 2.25 cups flour, 1 tsp baking soda, and 1 tsp salt. Fold in 2 cups of semi-sweet chocolate chips. Drop large spoonfuls onto a baking sheet and bake at 375F (190C) for 9-11 minutes.
